lessons.title: Pre-seeded requirements had 3 must_fix gaps in GDPR erasure, storage backup, and data-plane security
lessons.observation: Challenger found storage backup conflated LRS with backup, GDPR erasure lacked deletion boundaries, and SQL/Storage network posture was ambiguous for a PII workload
lessons.expected: Pre-seeded artifacts should pass challenger review without must_fix findings
lessons.root_cause: Template-based pre-seeding did not include data-plane specifics or GDPR operational detail
lessons.recommendation: Enhance pre-seeded templates with explicit erasure scope, backup vs redundancy distinction, and data-store firewall requirements

lessons.title: Storage firewall requirement inconsistent with no-VNet network model
lessons.observation: Second challenger pass found storage firewall rules stated App Service IP restriction but VNet integration was explicitly not required, creating an unimplementable posture
lessons.expected: Network security requirements should be internally consistent with the chosen connectivity model
lessons.root_cause: First challenger fix addressed symptoms but did not reconcile the storage firewall rule with the public-endpoint-only architecture
lessons.recommendation: When no private endpoints or VNet integration, use Entra RBAC as the storage access control model instead of IP-based firewall rules

lessons.title: Pre-seeded plan omitted Key Vault and lacked explicit SQL Entra/Storage RBAC config
lessons.observation: Challenger security-governance review found Key Vault removed ('simple complexity'), SQL AD-only auth not concrete enough, and Storage shared key access not disabled
lessons.expected: Implementation plan should carry forward all resources from approved architecture and governance constraints
lessons.root_cause: Pre-seeded plan was created before governance discovery; simplification removed Key Vault
lessons.recommendation: IaC Plan agents must cross-reference governance constraints JSON before finalizing resource inventory

lessons.title: Bicep Storage networkAcls bypass value required spaces after commas
lessons.observation: Initial fix used 'AzureServices,Logging,Metrics' which Bicep type system rejected; correct value is 'AzureServices, Logging, Metrics'
lessons.expected: Generated Bicep should use correct enum literal values on first attempt
lessons.root_cause: AVM module type constraints use specific string enum values with spaces; conductor applied standard comma-separated formatting
lessons.recommendation: When adding networkAcls bypass values, check AVM module type definition for exact accepted string literals

lessons.title: E2E step validator referenced non-existent npm script name
lessons.observation: validate-e2e-step.mjs referenced 'npm run validate:governance-refs' but correct name is 'npm run lint:governance-refs'
lessons.expected: E2E validator should reference correct npm script names
lessons.root_cause: Script naming inconsistency between validate: and lint: prefixes in package.json
lessons.recommendation: Add a validator cross-reference check: ensure all npm scripts referenced in validate-e2e-step.mjs exist in package.json

lessons.title: Session state decision_log entries missing required fields
lessons.observation: Pre-seeded session state had decision_log entries with 'decision' field instead of required 'id', 'agent', 'title', 'choice' fields
lessons.expected: Pre-seeded session state should conform to the validate-session-state.mjs schema
lessons.root_cause: Session state was pre-seeded with a different decision_log schema than the validator expects
lessons.recommendation: Pre-seeded session state files should be validated against the schema before committing
